center.name: 帝汶島
center.summary: 帝汶島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括Pheasant coucal、淡色杜鹃、Timor cuckoo-dove等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: }} The black-faced woodswallow (Artamus cinereus) is a woodswallow of the genus Artamus native to Australia, New Guinea, and the Sunda Islands, including Timor.{{Cite journal |last1=Trainor |first1=Colin R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The iris lorikeet is distributed in the forests and woodlands on the islands of Wetar and Timor in the Lesser Sundas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the mountains of eastern Java, Bali, Timor and Alor Island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: neglecta, Darwin | genus = Grallina | species = cyanoleuca | authority = (Latham, 1801) | range_map = Distribution magpie-lark.jpg | range_map_caption= Distribution shown in green | synonyms = }} The magpie-lark (Grallina cyanoleuca), also known as wee magpie, peewee, peewit, mudlark or Murray magpie, is a passerine bird native to Australia, Timor, and southern New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Guinea, Timor, and northern Australia (from Broome in Western Australia to the Shire of Burdekin in Queensland). Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in forest, woodland and cultivated areas on Timor and smaller nearby islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Australia, Timor and New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Timor, Wetar, and the eastern Lesser Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Southeast Asia on the islands of Timor, Rote and Wetar in the Lesser Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bird inhabits the grasslands and lowlands of the Timor archipelago with its distribution typically sparse

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in Australia, mostly south of latitude 20°S, and on Timor island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is found in Wetar and Timor. Fewer than 20 birds were collected on Wetar around 1900, and there were many records in 2008 and 2009

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |title=Birds, birding and conservation in Timor-Leste |journal=BirdingASIA |date=2008 |volume=9 |pages=16–45 |url=https://www.researchgate.net/publication/225291551}} Its natural habitats are tropical dry forests and tropical moist lowland forests. The nominate race is found in Timor, Semau, and Kisar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: rotiensis}} }} The Australian boobook (Ninox boobook), is a species of owl native to mainland Australia, southern New Guinea, the island of Timor, and the Sunda Islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The tricolored parrotfinch (Erythrura tricolor) is a species of estrildid finch found in Timor and the southern Moluccas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Australia, with some migration to the islands of Timor and Papua New Guinea. It is between in size, with distinctive markings such as a dark bill, a dark eye with a gold eye-ring and olive grey feet which differentiate it from other cuckoos
